offer: For accounting firms processing 10–50 invoices/month, manual calculations cause late tax filings. We automate report generation instead of manual spreadsheet calculations.
problem: Inaccurate sales tax reporting due to manual processes.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms seeking help
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Community forums where accounting firms share tools
try_it: Let users try manual data entry for 1-3 transactions
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
